flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Wells College rose 77% between 2006 and 2009 ($16.8k → $29.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Wells College rose 77% between 2006 and 2009 ($16.8k → $29.7k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Wells College rose 31% between 2006 and 2009 ($11.3k → $14.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 18 pp at Wells College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (40.9% vs 58.8%).
